use_cases: Primary CTA button in navigation bars with animated text reveal effect
Call-to-action button for showcasing portfolio or case studies
Interactive button for product or service pages
Hover-animated navigation element for modern web interfaces
Animated CTA for marketing and landing pages
ai_summary: A minimalist pill-shaped button component featuring a hover animation where the text slides upward and reveals a green background fill. The transition creates a smooth morphing effect between text states with a clean flat visual style suitable for modern web interfaces.
